title: Minecraft but Every Block Breaks
description: Minecraft but every block gets broken when you mine it in the world.
body:
# Carvs Block Break Chaos

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/CfLjIuFI-x0" title="Carvs Block Break Chaos YouTube video" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A chaotic Minecraft challenge mod originally created for YouTuber **Carvs**.

The idea is simple: **try to beat Minecraft while the entire world fights back.**

The moment you break a block, every matching block in the world can be destroyed. Mine one block, and suddenly the world starts falling apart around you. Break the wrong thing, and you might remove your only way forward.

And it gets worse.

If you absorb or remove water, **all water in the world can disappear**.

Good luck beating the game. You’re going to need it.

---

## Features

- Break one block and trigger massive world destruction
- Destroy matching blocks across the world
- Optional crack animation effect for dramatic destruction
- Configurable drop radius
- Configurable maximum drops to prevent lag
- Designed for chaotic Minecraft survival challenges
- Perfect for YouTube videos, speedruns, and challenge content

---

## Commands

### Crack Animation

```txt
/blockbreak crackanim <amount>
````

### Drop Radius

```txt
/blockbreak drops <radius>
```

### Maximum Drops

```txt
/blockbreak maxdrops <amount>
```

---

## Challenge Idea

Try to beat Minecraft while every block you break causes destruction across the world.

Need wood? Better think carefully.
Need stone? Hope you still have land left.
Need water? Don’t mess up, because it might all disappear.

This mod turns a normal survival world into a ridiculous, high-stakes challenge where every block matters.

---

## Recommended For

* Minecraft YouTubers
* Challenge videos
* Hardcore survival runs
* Speedrun-style chaos
* Multiplayer troll/challenge content

---

## Warning

This mod is intentionally destructive. Use it on a new world or a backup world.

Once the chaos starts, your world may never be the same.
